preamble: The transformation from a voiced postalveolar affricate [dʒ] to a voiced retroflex fricative [ʐ]. This shift involves both deaffrication and a slight retraction of the place of articulation.

examples.note: Historical deaffrication and retraction of the voiced palatal series.

sources: Baxter, W. H. (1992). A Handbook of Old Chinese Phonology.
